reviews.originalComment: Saya  booking via agoda Pukul 20.00 WIB , dan check in jam 21.00 WIB, dengan rate beserta Tax  Rp.298k . Meskipun kamarnya diujung, lantai 2 dan lift tidak berfungsi..tapi worth it untuk harga segitu
reviews.reviewComments: I booked via Agoda at 8:00 PM WIB, and checked in at 9:00 PM WIB, with a rate including tax of IDR 298k. Although the room is at the end, on the 2nd floor and the elevator is not functioning, it was worth it for that price.

reviews.originalComment: Not bad,kamar ga wangi dan ga bau jg,tapi kamar mandi agak bau walaupun ga kotor.. yg perfect adalah ini di tengah kota bangett
reviews.reviewComments: Not bad, the room is not fragrant and doesn't smell either, but the bathroom has a bit of a smell even though it's not dirty.. the perfect thing is that it's right in the middle of the city.

reviews.originalComment: Saran aja,kalau bisa sarapannya ada ikan atau telur dadar gitu,karena sebagian ada org gak suka ayam,tapi keselurahannya mantap🫰🏻
reviews.reviewComments: Just a suggestion, if possible, for breakfast there could be fish or an omelet, because some people don’t like chicken, but overall it's great!🫰🏻

reviews.originalComment:
Kamarnya lumayan luas, namun tidak ada ac di kamar, wifi tidak nyambung ke dalam kamar, dan tv juga tidak bisa dihidupkan. 
Makanan hanya 1 jenis (nasi goreng) dan roti (oke laaah)
Staf ramah.
reviews.reviewComments:
The room is quite spacious, but there is no air conditioning in the room, the wifi doesn’t connect to the room, and the TV cannot be turned on. 
Food is only one type (fried rice) and bread (that's okay). 
The staff is friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Cocok untuk menginap saja, tidak untuk menikmati suasana. Krna pas saya menginap, dengan harga segitu, agak mengecewakan. Soalnya gak ada AC atau Kipas Angin, air panasnya juga bisa untuk 1 org mandi, trus habis... Semoga makin maju terus hotelnya, supaya bisa memperbaiki kualitas hotel 👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for just staying overnight, not for enjoying the atmosphere. Because when I stayed, for that price, it was quite disappointing. There is no AC or fan, the hot water is only enough for one person to shower, then it's gone... I hope the hotel continues to progress, so it can improve its quality. 👍👍👍

There is no AC or fan, the hot water is only enough for one person to shower, then it's gone... I hope the hotel continues to progress, so it can improve its quality. 👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk hotel yang harga normalnya start 500 ribu fasilitas kamarnya masih sangat kurang. jendela ga ada kuncinya, TV nya masih modek lama, wifi nya ga bisa terhubung, kamar mandi ga ada pemanasnya, juga ga di sediakan pemanas air listrik. 
Utk staff nya sebenarnya cukup ramah, tapi kurang gercep pelayanannya, pas kita tanya jawabannya baik bu ga ada penolakan, tapi sampe ber jam2 kita tungguin belum terpenuhi permintaannya.
reviews.reviewComments: For a hotel that normally starts at 500 thousand, the room facilities are still very lacking. The window has no lock, the TV is an old model, the wifi cannot connect, the bathroom has no heater, and there is no electric water heater provided. The staff is actually quite friendly, but their service is slow. When we asked questions, the answers were polite but there was no rejection, however, we waited for hours and our requests were not met.

reviews.originalComment: Kasurnya bunyi-bunyi dan ada tungaunya, setelah menginap di sana badan saya merah-merah karna gigitan tungau kasur, kamar mandinya juga bau sekali
reviews.reviewComments: The bed made noises and had mites, after staying there my body was red from bedbug bites, the bathroom also smelled very bad.

The toilet is smelly even its satisfactory clean.  
The food is up to standard in my opinion and I like the soup.

The mattress, blanket, quilt are dirty. I have infected by fungus because of hygiene of the hotel. 
In addition, the toilet is very smelly and caused the room smelly all the time.
Besides, the breakfast is below average, and less of variety.

reviews.reviewTitle: A great place without many tourists
reviews.reviewComments: I really enjoyed my stay at this hotel and in takengon, away from everything. I felt that the rooms were very clean, good room service, well meaning English speaking front lobby staff. It was a comfortable enough stay amid rugged surroundings. I think takengon is underrated. The lake is really beautiful even though the shore is littered with garbage. You don't need a guide to walk around and you'll feel as if you are the only one there. Just like at the hotel. More people should come.

reviews.reviewTitle: Staff tried to enter my room as I slept
reviews.reviewComments: I was ill and sleeping at 4 in the afternoon when I was awoken by a member of the staff using a key to try to open the door to my room. I had the latch on so he did not enter, but when I opened the door, he had no cleaning cart or obvious reason to be doing so. I was one of only a few people staying there, so it seemed that he would know the room was occupied. The front desk apologized but had no explanation for his actions. It may have been an honest mistake or something dishonest. I can't say. Either way, it was an unpleasant way to be awoken.
reviews.reviewPositives: soft bed, ok location, good wifi

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel is simple and liveable. Just basics.
reviews.reviewComments: I managed to get my required rest
Its a good for value hotel to stay.

reviews.reviewTitle: The only  decent hotel in the area
reviews.reviewComments: Standard for sleeping only.

First, I would like to highlight that the hotel's location indicated on Agoda's map is inaccurate.  The hotel is, in fact, located just along the main street and a couple of streets away from the indicated location.

Other than that, the stay in Hotel Bayu Hill is generally comfortable and enjoyable.  The room is big and clean.  The bed is comfortable and clean as well.  The bathroom, however, does not have a basin.  The Hotel also has a gym on the second floor.  The gym equipment is however, inadequate.  In overall, a recommended stay in Hotel Bayu Hill.
reviews.reviewPositives: Large room, Comfortable Beds, and Good Breakfast.

reviews.reviewComments: friendly staff, clean room/toilets were the order of the day. would have been perfect if the free wifi was available from all the rooms - it is currently accessible only from the wifi zone near the lobby. also, as with most hotels in indonesia, it is best to avoid the hotel's breakfast.
reviews.reviewPositives: Clean and neat rooms - clean toilets as well.

reviews.originalComment:
Disarankan agar restauran di lantai bawah
Dan area parkir di perluas lagi
reviews.reviewComments: It is recommended that the restaurant on the lower floor and the parking area be further expanded.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan nya worth it utk harga segitu.. Recom bawa keluarga utk Stacation disini.
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is worth it for the price. Highly recommend bringing the family for a staycation here.

reviews.originalComment:
pelayanan ramah baik. 
salam dr Cyber Parabola
reviews.reviewComments:
friendly service. 
greetings from Cyber Parabola

reviews.originalComment: Kebersihan kamarnya kurang, d lemari banyak debu, dan pinggiran wc nya kotor
reviews.reviewComments: His room is not clean, the cupboard has a lot of dust, and the edges of the toilet are dirty.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat recommended, fasilitas sesuai, bersih, staf super ramah, informatif dan sangat membantu. Lokasi di pusat kota
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended, the facilities are appropriate, clean, super friendly staff, informative and very helpful. Location in the city center.
It take time to get hot water, over all its OK

reviews.originalComment: Air panasnya ga hidup,  lantai kamar mandinya licin, lantai kamarnya bergetah, seperti diletakkan pembersih lantai namun tidak dipakaikan air .
reviews.reviewComments: The hot water is not working, the bathroom floor is slippery, the bedroom floor is sticky, as if a floor cleaner was applied but water was not used.

reviews.originalComment:
Tempat Strategis, bersih, Pelayanan Bagus, Sukses selalu Hotel Bayu Hill, 
Saya nginap 19 Agustus 2023
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location, clean, good service, always successful Hotel Bayu Hill, I stayed on August 19, 2023.

Stayed with 4 family...
Nice and helpfull staff...
Great location as it is close to city...

reviews.reviewTitle: the price does not match the quality
reviews.originalComment: saya nginap di kamar harga 450rb, tp tmpt tidurnya bunyi2, semalaman ga bs tdr, krn stiap anak tidur dan balik kiri kanan kasurnya bunyi, kami smua begadang dan akhirnya tidur dilantai alasin selimut, tmpt tdr ga layak pakai itu,, setiap gerak bunyi, ank pertama dan kedua saya yg tdr d tmpt tdr itu, bayangin aja yg total bb nya ga smpe 30 kg aja bs bunyi2 apalagi klo mamak bapaknya juga duduk/tdr dsitu, kapok ga lagi k hotel ini, kebersihan oke, kamar mandi juga bersih.
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed in a room priced at 450,000, but the bed was noisy, I couldn't sleep all night because every time the kids turned left or right, the mattress made noise. We all stayed up and ended up sleeping on the floor with a blanket as a mat; that sleeping place is not suitable for use. Every movement causes noise, my first and second children were the ones sleeping in that spot, just imagine, someone with a total weight of not even 30 kg can make noise, especially if mom and dad are also sitting/sleeping there. I won't come back to this hotel again, the cleanliness was okay, the bathroom was also clean.

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman nginap di hotel bayu hill
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable staying at Bayu Hill Hotel.
Vriendelijk personeel dat zijn best deed om te helpen. Beveiliger hielp ons een bus te regelen naar de volgende bestemming. Prima kamer met goede douche.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel yang lemas dengan bau asap rokok
reviews.reviewComments: Bilik agak kecil serta tiada privacy sebab tetamu lain banyak bersidai di depan tingkap kami untuk berbual-bual serta menghisap rokok. Ini mengganggu kami ketika hendak berehat di dalam bilik. Nampak keseluruhan hotel, tetamu bebas merokok. Bagi yang tidak merokok memang ini cukup mengganggu ketenteraman untuk berehat. Bilik air tidak bersih serta berbau tidak menyenangkan. Tetapi yang baik di hotel ini ialah sarapan pagi ada banyak pilihan serta banyak. Sarapan cukup memuaskan.
reviews.reviewPositives: 1. Sarapan pagi beraneka pilihan 2. Kedudukan tempat strategik di tengah bandar 3. Harga terjangkau

reviews.reviewComments: good

reviews.reviewTitle: lokasi startegis dikota dan dekat pasar dan mesjid
reviews.reviewComments: kebersihan kamar mandi tolong diperhatikan, terutama dinding kamar mandi berlumut. Ketika saya menginap di kamar standard, air panas dari pancuran tidak mengucur.
Resepsionis kurang komunikatif, dan tidak menyediakan petunjuk destinasi wisata di Takengon
satu kamar kondisi bagus, yang satunya lagi bau apek, nginap 2 malam tapi kamar tidak dibersihkan untuk hari berikutnya, air minum juga tidak disediakan untuk hari berikutnya.
reviews.reviewPositives: sesuai harga, lumayan bersih, ada alat olahraga gratis

reviews.reviewTitle: satu satu nya hotel yang baru di takengon
reviews.reviewComments:
tiada pilihan lain. Bayu hill satu satu nya hotel yang bisa jadi pilihan untuk bermalam.
Semua kondisi dalam taraf standart.
Untuk pengelolaan pariwisata untuk lebih diperhatikan.
Penampilan hotel dari depan kecil. Namun parkiran ada disamping dan lumayan. Mushola terdapat di area parkiran. Kamar tergolong apa adanya dan standart.
